productDisplayName: Lotus Herbals Pomegranate & Plum Energizing Skin Polisher
description: Pomegranate and plum energising skin polisher for all skin types Pomegranate contains skin renewal properties, which helps increase collagen in the skin which in turn helps increase elasticity of the skin, reduce the appearance of wrinkles and fine lines on the skin and prevent the formation of age spots Plums contains anti-oxidant that are very good for skin, it makes skin soft and supple with a healthy glow
